coverage.criterion: Chat UI accepts natural-language questions about finances
coverage.notes: AiOrchestrator SSE POST /api/v1/chat/stream with JWT auth and tool-calling loop (T-0067); React ChatPanel + useChatStream fetch/SSE parser with message input and streaming tokens (T-0068); header Sheet drawer and /chat full-page route sharing ChatPanel (T-0069); operator guide documents Sheet vs /chat and suggested prompts (T-0072)

coverage.criterion: AI invokes only registered tools (get_transactions, get_subscriptions, get_forecast, get_budget_status, get_portfolio, simulate_plan) — no direct DB access
coverage.notes: AiTool trait + ToolContext without DbPool + registry allowlist and OpenAI tools array (T-0065); six tool implementations delegating to in-process services only, no sqlx/Firefly in ai/tools (T-0066); orchestrator validates tool names and executes via registry (T-0067); static audit + unit tests assert no DbPool/Firefly in ai path and six names match migration CHECK (T-0071)

[ai] TOML section + api_key_env overlay + settings API openai_configured flag (T-0062); OpenAI client factory and ProviderNotConfigured when key absent (T-0065); orchestrator streams via OpenAI with structured SSE error on missing key (T-0067); Settings AI section read-only display and configured badge (T-0070); user guide OPENAI_API_KEY and TOML model setup (T-0072)

coverage.criterion: Privacy settings: allow_raw_transactions, redact_iban, redact_counterparties honored in tool responses
coverage.notes: PrivacyConfig from TOML + TransactionsService aggregate vs raw cap modes (T-0062); PrivacyLayer central redaction + summarize_args for audit (T-0064); tools return payloads sized for layer/orchestrator path (T-0066); orchestrator applies PrivacyLayer before OpenAI and audit on every tool output (T-0067); Settings read-only privacy toggles (T-0070); PrivacyLayer unit + integration redaction tests (T-0071); operator guide privacy defaults and TOML restart workflow (T-0072)

coverage.criterion: Example queries work: affordability check, subscription price changes, budget overrun explanation, savings from cancelling subscription, top spending categories
coverage.notes: PlanService project_ephemeral/readonly for simulate_plan leasing and savings_mode templates (T-0063); six tools with explicit query-to-tool mapping table for all five examples (T-0066); multi-round orchestrator enables chained tool calls (T-0067); SuggestedPrompts chips match German example queries (T-0068); optional AC-5 smoke tests with mocked services (T-0071); user guide example queries and expected tool behavior (T-0072)

coverage.criterion: Tool call audit log available for operator review
coverage.notes: Migration 006 ai_tool_audit schema + retention job + audit repository insert/list (T-0061); orchestrator inserts redacted args_summary per invocation + GET /api/v1/ai/audit (T-0067); Settings AI & Privacy audit table with pagination (T-0070); integration test audit persistence when DATABASE_URL set (T-0071); operator guide audit retention and review workflow (T-0072)
